mapper.sql: id, task_id, attempt_no, worker_id, status, heartbeat_at, started_at, finished_at, error_message, created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE task_execution SET heartbeat_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'RUNNING'
UPDATE task_execution SET status = 'CANCELLED', heartbeat_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'RUNNING'
UPDATE task_execution SET status = 'SUCCEEDED', heartbeat_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), error_message = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'RUNNING'
UPDATE task_execution SET status = 'FAILED', heartbeat_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), error_message = #{errorMessage} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'RUNNING'
mapper.select: SELECT FROM task_execution WHERE status = 'RUNNING' AND ( heartbeat_at IS NULL OR heartbeat_at < TIMESTAMPADD(SECOND, -#{timeoutSeconds}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3)) ) ORDER BY heartbeat_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
